name: NodeJs
scope: An advanced Node.js professional should deeply understand core concepts like asynchronous programming, event loop mechanisms, non-blocking I/O, streams, buffers, cluster modules for scaling, and the V8 engine execution; possess advanced JavaScript and TypeScript skills including ES6+ features, closures, prototypes, async/await, and generators; be proficient in module and package management with CommonJS and ES6 modules, and in creating and publishing reusable packages on npm. They should be capable of designing and building complex systems such as scalable and high-performance applications, microservices architectures, real-time applications using WebSockets or libraries like Socket.IO, and handling high traffic and large data volumes; have advanced knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis), ORM/ODM tools like Sequelize or Mongoose, and expertise in database optimization and query performance tuning. They need to excel in building robust RESTful APIs, be familiar with GraphQL, and implement API versioning, documentation, and comprehensive testing strategies; operate and improve existing systems through performance optimization, profiling, memory leak detection, caching strategies, and have a deep understanding of security best practices, common vulnerabilities, secure authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, OAuth), encryption, and secure coding practices. Proficiency with frameworks like Express.js, Koa.js, NestJS, and Hapi, including the ability to extend and customize them, experience with DevOps and deployment using Docker, Kubernetes, setting up CI/CD pipelines, and deploying and managing applications on cloud platforms like AWS or Azure is essential. They should implement comprehensive testing strategies using tools like Mocha, Jest, ESLint, and Istanbul; lead development teams, mentor junior developers, facilitate code reviews, and promote best coding practices. Proficiency in Agile methodologies, task estimation, sprint planning, stakeholder communication, analyzing complex requirements, innovating solutions, staying updated with industry trends, identifying and implementing process improvements, best practices, and automating tasks is expected; delivering high-quality, maintainable code, robust and scalable applications, and enhancing team performance are key outcomes.
